blocks.title: Build belonging through shared action
blocks.body: Our sample mission is to help neighbors participate, learn, volunteer, and celebrate together.

image.caption: Community garden day
image.description: Illustration of volunteers planting flowers and vegetables together.

cards.title: Welcome
cards.body: Make participation easy for newcomers and long-time members.

cards.title: Respect
cards.body: Honor different backgrounds, languages, abilities, and schedules.

cards.title: Stewardship
cards.body: Use shared resources carefully and transparently.

cards.title: Collaboration
cards.body: Work with local partners and volunteers to increase impact.
